name: workframe
description: Adaptive local entrypoint for Workframe runtimes and model providers.

scripts.check: node --check bin/workframe.js && node --check lib/dialogue.js && node --check lib/session.js && node --check lib/flow.js && node --check lib/process.js && node --check lib/discovery.js && node --check lib/inference.js && node --check lib/terminal.js
scripts.test: npm run check && node --test checks/*.test.js && node bin/workframe.js --version && node bin/workframe.js status --json > /dev/null
